files.source:
const PORTABLE_RPC_ALLOWLIST_ = Object.freeze({
  getStudentEntryOptions: true,
  studentInit: true,
  studentLoadState: true,
  getStudentPreviousReview: true,
  getStudentPastRecords: true,
  getTimeline: true,
  autoSave: true,
  submitReview: true,
  queueAiRescueTrigger: true,
  kickAiNow: true,
  teacherInit: true,
  teacherStatusInit: true,
  teacherRosterInit: true,
  teacherEditorInit: true,
  teacherPromptInit: true,
  teacherHelpInit: true,
  refreshTeacherShellConfig: true,
  requestTeacherAppUpdate: true,
  getSelfUpdateInfo: true,
  runTeacherSelfUpdate: true,
  rollbackTeacherDeployment: true,
  getAiQueueStatus: true,
  retryFailedAiResponses: true,
  repairMissingAggregateEntries: true,
  getLessonStatus: true,
  generateTeacherFeedbackDrafts: true,
  saveTeacherFeedbackDraft: true,
  saveTeacherFeedbackMedal: true,
  returnTeacherFeedbackDrafts: true,
  clearTeacherFeedbackDrafts: true,
  saveRecentCustomFieldPreset: true,
  deleteRecentCustomFieldPreset: true,
  saveRosterEntries: true,
  updateSubjectDefault: true,
  saveGlobalSettings: true,
  setActiveTimelineField: true,
  teacherStartLesson: true,
  teacherEndLesson: true,
  getLessonFieldConfig: true,
  saveLessonFieldConfig: true,
  saveUnit: true,
  deleteUnit: true,
  getAggregateDataJson: true,
  getAggregateData: true,
  exportAggregateCsv: true,
  getStudentPortfolioDataJson: true,
  getStudentPortfolioData: true,
  getAiLogSnapshot: true,
  generateStudentPortfolioSummary: true,
  generateUnitSummary: true,
  generateTeacherAssessmentDrafts: true,
  generateTeacherAssessmentDraftsBySubject: true,
  saveTeacherAssessment: true,
  purgeAiLogsOlderThan: true
});

function dispatchPortableRpc_(body) {
  const payload = body && body.payload ? body.payload : {};
  const method = String(payload.method || '').trim();
  const args = Array.isArray(payload.args) ? payload.args : [];
  if (!method) {
    throw new Error('Missing rpc method.');
  }
  if (!PORTABLE_RPC_ALLOWLIST_[method]) {
    throw new Error(`RPC method is not allowed: ${method}`);
  }
  const fn = globalThis[method];
  if (typeof fn !== 'function') {
    throw new Error(`RPC target is not available: ${method}`);
  }
  return fn.apply(null, args);
}

files.name: teacher_polyfills
files.source:
<script>
(function(){
  if (!Array.prototype.find) {
    Array.prototype.find = function(predicate, thisArg) {
      if (this == null) throw new TypeError('Array.prototype.find called on null or undefined');
      if (typeof predicate !== 'function') throw new TypeError('predicate must be a function');
      var list = Object(this);
      var length = list.length >>> 0;
      for (var i = 0; i < length; i += 1) {
        var value = list[i];
        if (predicate.call(thisArg, value, i, list)) return value;
      }
      return void 0;
    };
  }

  if (!Array.prototype.includes) {
    Array.prototype.includes = function(search, start) {
      var list = Object(this);
      var length = list.length >>> 0;
      if (!length) return false;
      var index = start | 0;
      if (index < 0) index = Math.max(length + index, 0);
      for (; index < length; index += 1) {
        if (list[index] === search || (search !== search && list[index] !== list[index])) return true;
      }
      return false;
    };
  }

  if (!String.prototype.includes) {
    String.prototype.includes = function(search, start) {
      return this.indexOf(search, start || 0) !== -1;
    };
  }

  if (!Array.from) {
    Array.from = function(source) {
      if (!source) return [];
      var out = [];
      var length = typeof source.length === 'number' ? source.length : 0;
      for (var i = 0; i < length; i += 1) out.push(source[i]);
      return out;
    };
  }

  if (!Object.assign) {
    Object.assign = function(target) {
      if (target == null) throw new TypeError('Cannot convert undefined or null to object');
      var to = Object(target);
      for (var i = 1; i < arguments.length; i += 1) {
        var source = arguments[i];
        if (source == null) continue;
        for (var key in source) {
          if (Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(source, key)) {
            to[key] = source[key];
          }
        }
      }
      return to;
    };
  }

  if (typeof window.requestAnimationFrame !== 'function') {
    window.requestAnimationFrame = function(callback) {
      return window.setTimeout(function(){ callback(Date.now ? Date.now() : new Date().getTime()); }, 16);
    };
  }

  if (typeof window.requestIdleCallback !== 'function') {
    window.requestIdleCallback = function(callback) {
      return window.setTimeout(function(){
        callback({
          didTimeout: false,
          timeRemaining: function(){ return 0; }
        });
      }, 1);
    };
  }

  if (typeof window.Map !== 'function') {
    window.Map = function(iterable) {
      this._keys = [];
      this._values = [];
      if (iterable && typeof iterable.length === 'number') {
        for (var i = 0; i < iterable.length; i += 1) {
          this.set(iterable[i][0], iterable[i][1]);
        }
      }
    };
    window.Map.prototype.set = function(key, value) {
      var index = this._keys.indexOf(key);
      if (index === -1) {
        this._keys.push(key);
        this._values.push(value);
      } else {
        this._values[index] = value;
      }
      return this;
    };
    window.Map.prototype.get = function(key) {
      var index = this._keys.indexOf(key);
      return index === -1 ? void 0 : this._values[index];
    };
    window.Map.prototype.has = function(key) {
      return this._keys.indexOf(key) !== -1;
    };
    window.Map.prototype.values = function() {
      return this._values.slice();
    };
  }

  if (typeof window.Set !== 'function') {
    window.Set = function(iterable) {
      this._values = [];
      if (iterable && typeof iterable.length === 'number') {
        for (var i = 0; i < iterable.length; i += 1) this.add(iterable[i]);
      }
    };
    window.Set.prototype.add = function(value) {
      if (this._values.indexOf(value) === -1) this._values.push(value);
      return this;
    };
    window.Set.prototype.has = function(value) {
      return this._values.indexOf(value) !== -1;
    };
    window.Set.prototype.values = function() {
      return this._values.slice();
    };
  }
})();
</script>

files.name: teacher_preflight
files.source:
<script>
(function(){
  function show(message){
    var text = String(message || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim();
    if (!text) return;
    var box = document.getElementById('teacherFatalError');
    if (!box) return;
    box.style.display = 'block';
    box.textContent = '画面エラー: ' + text;
  }

  window.showFatalTeacherError = show;
  window.__teacherPreflightLoaded = true;

  window.onerror = function(message, source, lineno, colno){
    var where = lineno ? ' @' + lineno + ':' + (colno || 0) : '';
    show(String(message || 'unknown error') + where);
    return false;
  };

  if (window.addEventListener) {
    window.addEventListener('unhandledrejection', function(event){
      var reason = event && event.reason;
      show((reason && reason.message) || String(reason || 'promise rejection'));
    });
    window.addEventListener('load', function(){
      setTimeout(function(){
        if (typeof window.switchTab !== 'function') {
          show('先生画面の操作スクリプトが読み込めていません。ブラウザが新しい構文に対応していない可能性があります。');
        }
      }, 800);
    });
  }
})();
</script>

files.name: teacher_section_curriculum
files.source:
📚 単元一覧

一覧から探しつつ、右のボタンで新規追加欄へすぐ移動できます。

➕ 新しい単元を追加

📋 この単元の記入項目

プリセットをワンクリックで追加、オン/オフや並び順も変更できます。

➕ カスタム項目を追加

選択肢は 1 行に 1 つずつ入力できます。カンマ区切りでも読み取ります。
既存項目を編集するときは、一覧の「編集」ボタンから読み込めます。項目キーは保持されるので、既存記録は消えません。
新しい単元は、必要なら保存後すぐに授業開始へ進めます。

🏫 教科ごとのデフォルト項目

単元作成時にこの設定が引き継がれます。

教科を選択してください

➕ この教科のカスタム項目を追加

選択肢は 1 行に 1 つずつ入力できます。カンマ区切りでも読み取ります。

単元ごとの根拠を見ながら評定できます。
AIには児童名を送らず出席番号だけを送信します。反映時は出席番号で評定先を照合し、画面は氏名付きで表示します。
観点を選ぶと根拠に使う項目を表示します。
評定に使う記録の取得状況を表示します。
#なまえ評定

files.name: teacher_section_help
files.source:
🚀 使い方

最初にやること、APIキー設定、WEB版の配布方法をここにまとめています。

1. 最初の流れ

  1. 単元設定で単元を作る
  2. 必要なら名簿を入れる
  3. 授業スタートで授業を開始する
  4. この下のWEB児童ページURLを配布する

2. 児童への配布

  1. 初回だけ下のWEB接続ページを児童端末で開く
  2. そのまま保存して接続確認する
  3. 2回目以降はWEB児童ページURLだけ配布する
  4. 児童はそのURLから毎時間入る
  5. 単元と時間目は先生側の授業スタートに連動する
WEB児童ページ
WEB児童ページQR
WEB接続ページ
WEB接続ページQR
初回だけWEB接続ページ、以後はWEB児童ページを配布してください。先生用の基本URLは児童には配りません。

3. Gemini APIキーの取得

  1. Google AI Studio を開く
  2. API Keys からキーを作成する
  3. 新しく作ったキーをコピーする
  4. 設定タブの「Gemini APIキー」に貼って保存する
新しいキーは auth key として作られます。キーは他人に共有しないでください。

4. APIキーの注意

  • キーはパスワードと同じ扱いです
  • 漏えいしたら新しいキーへ入れ替えてください
  • 動かないときは設定タブで保存し直してください

5. アプリの版情報

  • 版情報の確認は「設定・Aiプロンプト」タブの「版情報」から行います
  • 先生画面では現在の版と配布状況だけを見られます
  • 更新や版戻しは管理者側で行います

files.name: teacher_styles
files.source:
<style>
:root{
  --navy:#1A237E;--sky:#1976D2;--green:#388E3C;--red:#C62828;
  --yellow:#F9A825;--purple:#6A1B9A;--orange:#E65100;--teal:#00695C;
  --bg:#F5F5F5;--card:#fff;--muted:#78909C;
  --r:10px;--sh:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.10);
  --font:'Hiragino Maru Gothic ProN','BIZ UDPGothic',sans-serif;
}
*{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0;}
body{font-family:var(--font);background:var(--bg);color:#212121;}

.nav{background:var(--navy);color:#fff;display:flex;align-items:center;
  padding:0 16px;height:50px;position:sticky;top:0;z-index:100;
  box-shadow:0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,.3);gap:2px;overflow-x:auto;}
.nav h1{font-size:14px;margin-right:14px;white-space:nowrap;}
.tab{padding:0 12px;height:50px;border:none;background:transparent;
  color:rgba(255,255,255,.7);font-size:13px;cursor:pointer;white-space:nowrap;
  border-bottom:3px solid transparent;transition:.2s;font-family:var(--font);}
.tab.active{color:#fff;border-bottom-color:var(--yellow);}

.container{max-width:1000px;margin:0 auto;padding:16px;}
.section{display:none;}.section.active{display:block;}
.inner-tab-bar{
  display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin:0 0 12px;
  padding:10px 12px;border-radius:12px;background:#EEF4FF;border:1px solid #D7E3F8;
}
.inner-tab{
  padding:8px 14px;border:none;border-radius:999px;background:#fff;color:#46627d;
  font-size:12px;font-weight:bold;cursor:pointer;font-family:var(--font);
}
.inner-tab.active{background:var(--navy);color:#fff;}
.curriculum-pane,.record-pane,.prompt-pane{display:none;}
.curriculum-pane.active,.record-pane.active,.prompt-pane.active{display:block;}
.subtab-row{display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:14px;}
.subtab-btn{
  padding:8px 14px;border-radius:999px;border:1.5px solid #CFD8DC;background:#fff;
  color:#455A64;font-size:13px;font-weight:bold;cursor:pointer;font-family:var(--font);
}
.subtab-btn.active{background:#E8F0FF;border-color:#A9C3FF;color:#234A84;}
.build-bar{
  max-width:1000px;margin:0 auto;padding:0 16px 8px;
  font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);text-align:right;
}

.card{background:var(--card);border-radius:var(--r);padding:18px;box-shadow:var(--sh);margin-bottom:14px;}
.card h2{font-size:15px;font-weight:bold;margin-bottom:12px;color:var(--navy);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;}

/* バナー */
.lesson-banner{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#E8F5E9,#C8E6C9);border:2px solid var(--green);
  border-radius:var(--r);padding:14px;margin-bottom:14px;}
.lesson-banner .lbl{font-size:12px;color:var(--green);font-weight:bold;margin-bottom:3px;}
.lesson-banner .name{font-size:19px;font-weight:bold;color:var(--navy);}
.lesson-banner .meta{font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:2px;}
.lesson-banner-top{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:space-between;gap:12px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.lesson-banner-actions{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.lesson-banner-stats{margin:12px 0 0;}
.lesson-banner-stats .stat-box{background:rgba(255,255,255,.92);}
.btn-subtle{
  padding:9px 16px;border:1.5px solid #90CAF9;border-radius:10px;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,#F7FBFF,#E3F2FD);color:#0D47A1;
  font-size:13px;font-weight:bold;cursor:pointer;font-family:var(--font);
}
.lesson-action-btn{
  min-height:40px;padding:10px 16px;border-radius:10px;
  font-size:13px;font-weight:bold;line-height:1.4;
  display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
}
.lesson-banner-actions .btn-subtle,
.lesson-banner-actions .btn-ai,
.lesson-banner-actions .btn-end{
  min-width:220px;
  min-height:40px;
  padding:10px 16px;
  border-radius:10px;
  font-size:13px;
  margin-top:0;
}
.btn-end{padding:7px 16px;border:2px solid var(--red);border-radius:7px;
  background:#fff;color:var(--red);font-size:12px;font-weight:bold;cursor:pointer;font-family:var(--font);margin-top:8px;}

/* start panel */
.start-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:10px;}
.start-row select,.start-row input{
  padding:7px 10px;border:1.5px solid #CFD8DC;border-radius:7px;font-size:13px;font-family:var(--font);}
.btn-start{padding:9px 18px;border:none;border-radius:8px;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--green),#2E7D32);
  color:#fff;font-size:14px;font-weight:bold;cursor:pointer;font-family:var(--font);}
.btn-reset{padding:9px 14px;border:none;border-radius:8px;background:#CFD8DC;
  color:#37474F;font-size:13px;cursor:pointer;font-family:var(--font);}
.btn-medal{padding:9px 14px;border:none;border-radius:8px;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--yellow),#FB8C00);
  color:#4E342E;font-size:13px;font-weight:bold;cursor:pointer;font-family:var(--font);}
.status-top-card{padding-bottom:16px;}
.status-top-head{
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:10px;
  flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:12px;
}
.status-top-grid{
  display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(300px,1.1fr) minmax(360px,1.4fr);
  gap:12px;align-items:start;
}
.status-start-block,
.status-feedback-block{
  background:#F8FBFF;border:1px solid #E1ECF7;border-radius:12px;padding:12px;
}
.status-distribute-block{
  margin-bottom:12px;padding:14px;border-radius:12px;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,#FFF8E1,#FFFDF8);border:1px solid #FFE082;
}
.status-distribute-actions{
  display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:center;margin-bottom:10px;
}
.status-distribute-links{
  display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(260px,1fr));gap:10px;
}
.status-distribute-note{
  margin-top:10px;font-size:12px;line-height:1.7;color:#6D4C41;
}
.status-top-label{
  font-size:12px;font-weight:bold;color:var(--navy);margin-bottom:8px;
}
.status-start-row{margin-bottom:0;}
.status-start-row select{min-width:160px;flex:1 1 200px;}
/* stats */
.stat-row{display:flex;gap:10px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:14px;}
.stat-box{background:#fff;border-radius:9px;padding:10px 14px;box-shadow:var(--sh);text-align:center;min-width:76px;}
.stat-num{font-size:26px;font-weight:bold;color:var(--sky);}
.stat-lbl{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);}
.status-feedback-actions{display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:center;margin-bottom:8px;}
.status-feedback-actions .inp{min-width:180px;max-width:220px;flex:0 0 220px;}
.status-feedback-meta{font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.7;}
.status-feedback-result{
  display:none;margin-top:8px;padding:9px 11px;border-radius:10px;
  background:#E8F5E9;border:1px solid #A5D6A7;color:#1B5E20;
  font-size:12px;line-height:1.7;font-weight:bold;
}
.status-feedback-result.show{display:block;}
.insight-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(150px,1fr));gap:10px;margin-top:12px;}
.insight-box{background:#F8FBFF;border:1px solid #D6EAF8;border-radius:10px;padding:12px;}
.insight-k{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:4px;}
.insight-v{font-size:24px;font-weight:bold;color:var(--navy);}
.insight-sub{font-size:12px;color:#546E7A;line-height:1.6;}
.analysis-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(240px,1fr));gap:10px;margin-top:12px;}
.analysis-card{background:#fff;border:1px solid #E3F2FD;border-radius:10px;padding:12px;}
.analysis-card h3{font-size:13px;color:var(--navy);margin:0 0 8px;}
.mini-list{margin:0;padding-left:18px;font-size:12px;line-height:1.7;color:#37474F;}
.mini-list li{margin-bottom:4px;}
.dist-row{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px;}
.dist-chip{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;background:#ECEFF1;border-radius:999px;padding:4px 9px;font-size:12px;color:#37474F;}
.dist-chip .n{font-weight:bold;color:var(--navy);}

/* table */
.tbl{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:13px;}
.tbl th{background:var(--navy);color:#fff;padding:7px 9px;text-align:left;}
.tbl td{padding:7px 9px;border-bottom:1px solid #e0e0e0;}
.tbl tr:hover td{background:#F5F5F5;}
.status-table td.status-student-cell{width:58%;white-space:normal;word-break:break-word;vertical-align:top;}
.status-table td.status-state-cell{white-space:normal;word-break:break-word;line-height:1.6;}
.status-table td.status-name-cell{font-weight:bold;}
.status-table td.status-identity-cell{white-space:normal;word-break:break-word;line-height:1.7;}
.status-table td.status-progress-cell,
.status-table td.status-comment-cell{white-space:normal;word-break:break-word;line-height:1.7;}
.status-table td.status-medal-cell{white-space:nowrap;}
.status-table td.status-comment-cell{min-width:320px;vertical-align:top;}
.status-table td.status-state-cell,.status-table td.status-medal-cell{vertical-align:top;}
.status-student-stack{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;min-width:0;}
.status-student-head{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;min-width:0;}
.status-name-text{font-weight:bold;color:#263238;min-width:0;overflow-wrap:anywhere;}
.status-student-meta{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.status-inline-block{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;min-height:20px;}
.status-inline-state{font-size:12px;color:#455A64;line-height:1.6;}
.status-meta-stack{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px;}
.status-comment-head{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.status-meta-pill{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;padding:3px 9px;border-radius:999px;font-size:11px;font-weight:bold;}
.status-meta-pill.submitted{background:#E8F5E9;color:#2E7D32;}
.status-meta-pill.writing{background:#E3F2FD;color:#1565C0;}
.status-meta-pill.empty{background:#ECEFF1;color:#607D8B;}
.status-progress-note{font-size:12px;color:#546E7A;}
.status-field-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:7px;}
.status-field-item{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:2px;padding:6px 8px;border-radius:8px;background:#F8FBFF;border:1px solid #E3F2FD;}
.status-field-value,
.portfolio-card-text,
.agg-card-text,
.agg-processing-cell{
  white-space:pre-wrap;
  word-break:break-word;
}
.status-field-label,
.portfolio-card-label,
.agg-card-label{
  display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;width:fit-content;max-width:100%;
  padding:4px 10px;border-radius:999px;background:#E8F0FE;color:var(--navy);
  font-size:11px;font-weight:bold;line-height:1.4;
}
.inline-chip{
  display:inline-flex;
  align-items:center;
  margin:1px 2px 1px 0;
  padding:1px 8px;
  border-radius:999px;
  border:1.5px solid #8EC5FF;
  background:transparent;
  color:#1565C0;
  font-size:.96em;
  line-height:1.5;
  vertical-align:baseline;
}
.status-comment-empty{font-size:12px;color:#90A4AE;}
.status-comment-text{font-size:12px;line-height:1.7;white-space:pre-wrap;word-break:break-word;}
.status-ai-state-chip{
  display:inline-flex;align-items:center;min-height:20px;
  padding:2px 8px;border-radius:999px;background:#F1F5F9;color:#455A64;
  font-size:11px;line-height:1.5;
}
.status-draft-box{
  display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;padding:8px 9px;border-radius:10px;
  background:#FFF8E1;border:1px solid #FFE082;
  margin-top:8px;
}
.status-draft-head{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:8px;font-size:11px;color:#8D6E63;}
.status-draft-status.is-dirty{color:#E65100;font-weight:bold;}
.status-draft-textarea,
.status-draft-rank{
  width:100%;border:1.5px solid #D7CCC8;border-radius:8px;background:#fff;
  font-size:12px;font-family:var(--font);padding:7px 9px;
}
.status-draft-textarea.is-dirty,
.status-draft-rank.is-dirty{
  border-color:#FFB74D;background:#FFFDF4;
}
.status-draft-medal-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.status-draft-medal-label{font-size:11px;font-weight:bold;color:#6D4C41;white-space:nowrap;}
.status-draft-medal{
  min-width:160px;max-width:220px;border:1.5px solid #D7CCC8;border-radius:8px;background:#fff;
  font-size:12px;font-family:var(--font);padding:7px 9px;
}
.status-draft-textarea{min-height:84px;resize:vertical;line-height:1.7;}
.status-draft-actions{display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:center;}
.status-draft-note{font-size:11px;color:#8D6E63;line-height:1.6;}
@media(max-width:820px){
  .container{padding:10px;}
  .card{padding:14px;}
  .nav{padding:0 8px;}
  .status-top-grid{
    grid-template-columns:1fr;
  }
  .status-top-head .btn-update{
    width:100%;
  }
  .lesson-banner-top{
    flex-direction:column;
  }
  .lesson-banner-actions{
    width:100%;
  }
  .lesson-banner-actions .btn-subtle,
  .lesson-banner-actions .btn-ai,
  .lesson-banner-actions .btn-end{
    width:100%;
    margin-top:0;
  }
  .status-feedback-actions{
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns:1fr;
    gap:8px;
  }
  .status-distribute-actions{
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns:1fr;
  }
  .status-distribute-actions button{
    width:100%;
  }
  .status-distribute-links{
    grid-template-columns:1fr;
  }
  .status-feedback-actions .inp{
    min-width:0;
    max-width:none;
    width:100%;
  }
  .status-feedback-actions .agg-toggle{
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    gap:8px;
    font-size:12px;
  }
  .status-start-row{
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns:1fr;
    gap:8px;
  }
  .status-start-row select,
  .status-start-row button{
    width:100%;
  }
  .status-feedback-actions button{
    width:100%;
  }
  .status-table thead{display:none;}
  .status-table,
  .status-table tbody,
  .status-table tr,
  .status-table td{display:block;width:100%;}
  .status-table tr{
    margin-bottom:14px;
    border:1px solid #E3EAF2;
    border-radius:14px;
    background:#fff;
    box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(21,55,104,.08);
    overflow:hidden;
  }
  .status-table tr:hover td{background:transparent;}
  .status-table td{
    display:flex;
    flex-direction:column;
    gap:8px;
    padding:10px 12px;
    border-bottom:1px solid #EEF2F6;
  }
  .status-table td:last-child{border-bottom:none;}
  .status-table td::before{
    content:attr(data-label);
    display:block;
    font-size:11px;
    font-weight:bold;
    color:#607D8B;
    letter-spacing:.02em;
    line-height:1.4;
  }
  .status-table td.status-name-cell,
  .status-table td.status-identity-cell,
  .status-table td.status-student-cell{
    background:linear-gradient(180deg,#F7F9FC 0%,#FDFEFF 100%);
  }
  .status-table td.status-name-cell::before,
  .status-table td.status-identity-cell::before,
  .status-table td.status-student-cell::before{
    content:'児童';
  }
  .status-table td.status-student-cell{
    max-width:none;
    line-height:1.7;
  }
  .status-table td.status-progress-cell,
  .status-table td.status-comment-cell{
    line-height:1.7;
  }
  .status-table td.status-state-cell{
    line-height:1.7;
  }
  .status-table td.status-comment-cell{
    min-width:0;
  }
  .status-student-head,
  .status-student-meta,
  .status-comment-head,
  .status-identity-foot{
    align-items:flex-start;
    flex-direction:column;
  }
  .status-table td.status-comment-cell,
  .status-table td.status-student-cell{
    overflow:visible;
  }
  .status-field-item{
    padding:8px 9px;
  }
  .status-draft-head{
    flex-direction:column;
    align-items:flex-start;
  }
  .status-draft-textarea{
    min-height:96px;
  }
  .status-draft-medal-row{
    flex-direction:column;
    align-items:flex-start;
  }
  .status-draft-medal{
    width:100%;
    max-width:none;
  }
  .status-draft-actions{
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns:1fr;
    gap:8px;
  }
  .status-draft-actions .btn-subtle,
  .status-draft-actions .btn-update,
  .status-draft-actions .btn-cancel{
    width:100%;
    margin-top:0;
  }
}
.rank-chip{display:inline-block;padding:2px 9px;border-radius:10px;font-weight:bold;font-size:11px;color:#fff;}
.r-C{background:#B0BEC5;}.r-Cp{background:#90A4AE;}
.r-B{background:#64B5F6;}.r-Bp{background:#42A5F5;}
.r-A{background:#66BB6A;}.r-Ap{background:#43A047;}
.r-S{background:var(--purple);}.r-Sp{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#6A1B9A,#E91E63);}
.medal-num{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  width:20px;height:20px;border-radius:50%;color:#fff;font-size:11px;font-weight:bold;}

/* unit list */
.unit-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:11px 13px;
  border-radius:9px;border:2px solid #e0e0e0;background:#fff;margin-bottom:7px;transition:.2s;}
.unit-row.active-unit{border-color:var(--sky);background:#E3F2FD;}
.unit-badge{min-width:42px;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:14px;font-size:11px;
  font-weight:bold;color:#fff;background:var(--muted);text-align:center;}
.unit-row.active-unit .unit-badge{background:var(--sky);}
.unit-name{font-weight:bold;font-size:14px;}
.unit-meta{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);}
.unit-actions{margin-left:auto;display:flex;gap:5px;}
.unit-list-top{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:10px;margin-bottom:12px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.unit-list-filters{display:grid;grid-template-columns:180px 1fr 180px;gap:8px;margin-bottom:12px;}
@media(max-width:640px){.unit-list-filters{grid-template-columns:1fr;}}
.unit-group{margin-bottom:12px;}
.unit-group-toggle{
  width:100%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:10px;
  border:none;border-radius:10px;padding:10px 12px;background:#EEF4FF;color:var(--navy);
  font-family:var(--font);font-size:13px;font-weight:bold;cursor:pointer;
}
.unit-group-toggle .meta{font-size:11px;color:#607D8B;font-weight:normal;}
.unit-group-body{padding-top:8px;}
.btn-jump-add{padding:8px 14px;border:none;border-radius:8px;background:var(--navy);color:#fff;font-size:12px;font-weight:bold;cursor:pointer;font-family:var(--font);}
.btn-sm{padding:5px 11px;border-radius:7px;font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;
  font-family:var(--font);border:none;font-weight:bold;}
.btn-edit{background:#E3F2FD;color:var(--sky);}
.btn-fields{background:#E8F5E9;color:var(--green);}
.btn-del{background:#FFEBEE;color:var(--red);}

/* form */
.form-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:10px;}
@media(max-width:540px){.form-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}}
label.fl{display:block;font-size:12px;font-weight:bold;margin-bottom:3px;}
input.inp,select.inp,textarea.inp{
  width:100%;border:1.5px solid #CFD8DC;border-radius:7px;
  padding:7px 10px;font-size:13px;font-family:var(--font);}
textarea.inp{resize:vertical;min-height:70px;}
.btn-primary{padding:9px 18px;border:none;border-radius:8px;
  background:var(--green);color:#fff;font-size:13px;font-weight:bold;cursor:pointer;font-family:var(--font);}
.btn-primary[disabled],.btn-update[disabled],.btn-cancel[disabled],.btn-jump-add[disabled]{
  opacity:.65;cursor:wait;
}
.btn-update{padding:9px 18px;border:none;border-radius:8px;
  background:var(--sky);color:#fff;font-size:13px;font-weight:bold;cursor:pointer;font-family:var(--font);}
.btn-cancel{padding:7px 16px;border:1.5px solid #CFD8DC;border-radius:7px;
  background:#fff;color:#37474F;font-size:13px;cursor:pointer;font-family:var(--font);}
.unit-save-meta{min-height:1.6em;}
.unit-save-meta.is-busy{color:var(--sky);font-weight:bold;}
.unit-save-meta.is-error{color:var(--red);font-weight:bold;}
.unit-save-meta.is-success{color:var(--green);font-weight:bold;}

/* ========= フィールドエディタ ========= */
.field-panel{border:1.5px solid #e0e0e0;border-radius:9px;padding:14px;margin-bottom:10px;background:#fff;}
.field-panel h4{font-size:13px;font-weight:bold;color:var(--navy);margin-bottom:10px;
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;}
.custom-add-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.1fr .9fr .7fr 1.3fr;gap:8px;margin-top:10px;}
@media(max-width:780px){.custom-add-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}}
.field-help{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:6px;line-height:1.6;}
.field-panel-actions{display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:10px;}
.category-checks{display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:8px;}
.category-check{
  display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:7px 10px;border-radius:999px;
  border:1.5px solid #CFD8DC;background:#fff;font-size:12px;color:#455A64;
}
.category-check input{margin:0;}
.roster-table td,.roster-table th{vertical-align:top;}
.roster-table input[type="number"],.roster-table input[type="text"]{width:100%;}

/* プリセットボタン群 */
.preset-group{margin-bottom:12px;}
.preset-group:last-child{margin-bottom:0;}
.preset-group-label{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);font-weight:bold;margin-bottom:6px;}
.preset-btns{display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:12px;}
.preset-btn{
  padding:7px 13px;border-radius:20px;border:2px solid var(--sky);
  background:#fff;color:var(--sky);font-size:12px;font-weight:bold;cursor:pointer;
  font-family:var(--font);transition:.15s;white-space:nowrap;
}
.preset-btn:hover{background:var(--sky);color:#fff;}
.preset-btn.active-preset{background:var(--sky);color:#fff;}
.preset-btn.recent-preset{border-color:var(--teal);color:var(--teal);padding-right:8px;}
.preset-btn.recent-preset:hover{background:#E0F2F1;color:var(--teal);}
.preset-btn.recent-preset.active-preset{background:var(--teal);color:#fff;}
.preset-chip-inner{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;}
.preset-remove{
  display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  width:18px;height:18px;border:none;border-radius:50%;
  background:rgba(0,0,0,.08);color:currentColor;cursor:pointer;
  font-size:12px;font-weight:bold;font-family:var(--font);
}
.preset-remove:hover{background:rgba(0,0,0,.16);}

/* フィールドリスト（ドラッグ順序変更） */
.field-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;margin-bottom:10px;}
.field-item{
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:9px 12px;
  background:#F5F5F5;border-radius:8px;border:1.5px solid #e0e0e0;
}
.field-item.enabled{background:#E8F5E9;border-color:var(--green);}
.field-item .drag-handle{color:#B0BEC5;cursor:grab;font-size:16px;flex-shrink:0;}
.field-item .f-emoji{font-size:16px;flex-shrink:0;}
.emoji-palette{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px;margin-top:8px;}
.emoji-pick{
  border:1px solid #CFE3F7;background:#F7FBFF;border-radius:999px;padding:5px 9px;
  font-size:16px;line-height:1;cursor:pointer;
}
.emoji-pick:hover{background:#E3F2FD;}
.field-item .f-label{font-size:13px;font-weight:bold;flex:1;}
.field-item .f-type{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);}
.field-order-actions{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;flex-shrink:0;}
.btn-move{
  width:28px;height:28px;border:none;border-radius:7px;background:#ECEFF1;color:#455A64;
  font-size:15px;font-weight:bold;cursor:pointer;font-family:var(--font);
}
.btn-move:disabled{opacity:.38;cursor:default;}
.toggle-btn{
  padding:4px 12px;border-radius:14px;border:none;font-size:12px;font-weight:bold;
  cursor:pointer;font-family:var(--font);white-space:nowrap;
}
.toggle-on{background:var(--green);color:#fff;}
.toggle-off{background:#CFD8DC;color:#37474F;}
.btn-remove{padding:4px 8px;border:none;border-radius:6px;background:#FFEBEE;
  color:var(--red);font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;font-family:var(--font);}
.btn-edit-field{padding:4px 8px;border:none;border-radius:6px;background:#E3F2FD;
  color:var(--sky);font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;font-family:var(--font);}

/* 教科デフォルト */
.subject-tabs{display:flex;gap:5px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:12px;}
.stab{padding:6px 12px;border-radius:16px;border:1.5px solid #CFD8DC;
  background:#fff;font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;font-family:var(--font);font-weight:bold;transition:.15s;}
.stab.active{background:var(--sky);border-color:var(--sky);color:#fff;}
.subject-help{font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:10px;}
.subject-preset-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px;margin-bottom:12px;}
.subject-custom-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;margin:10px 0 12px;}
.subject-empty{font-size:12px;color:#999;padding:10px 12px;background:#FAFAFA;border:1px dashed #CFD8DC;border-radius:8px;}
.subject-custom-meta{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);}
.subject-custom-head{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:10px;}

.guide-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(260px,1fr));gap:12px;}
.guide-card{
  background:#FAFCFF;border:1px solid #DCE8F8;border-radius:12px;padding:14px;
}
.guide-card h3{font-size:14px;color:var(--navy);margin-bottom:8px;}
.guide-list{margin:0;padding-left:18px;font-size:12px;line-height:1.9;color:#37474F;}
.guide-note{
  margin-top:10px;padding:10px 12px;border-radius:10px;background:#FFF8E1;
  border:1px solid #FFE082;font-size:12px;line-height:1.7;color:#6D4C41;
}
.guide-link-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(280px,1fr));gap:12px;}
.guide-link-card{
  background:#F8FBFF;border:1px solid #D8E7FF;border-radius:12px;padding:14px;
}
.guide-link-title{font-size:13px;font-weight:bold;color:var(--navy);margin-bottom:8px;}
.guide-link-actions{display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:center;margin:8px 0;}
.qr-card{
  margin-top:10px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:8px;
  padding:12px;border-radius:10px;background:#fff;border:1px solid #ECEFF1;
}
.qr-title{font-size:12px;font-weight:bold;color:#455A64;}
.qr-image{width:180px;height:180px;object-fit:contain;background:#fff;border-radius:8px;}
.update-help-card{
  background:#FFFDF8;border:1px solid #E7D9B8;border-radius:12px;padding:12px;
}
.update-help-row{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:10px;margin-bottom:8px;}
.update-help-label{font-size:12px;font-weight:bold;color:#455A64;}
.update-help-badge{
  display:inline-flex;align-items:center;padding:5px 10px;border-radius:999px;
  background:#EEF6FF;border:1px solid #CFE1FF;color:#234A84;font-size:12px;font-weight:bold;
}
.update-help-meta{font-size:12px;line-height:1.7;color:#455A64;}

/* aggregate */
.agg-toolbar{display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:12px;align-items:center;}
.agg-toolbar-filters{
  padding:10px 12px;border-radius:10px;background:#F7FAFF;border:1px solid #D8E7FF;
  margin-bottom:8px;
}
.agg-toolbar-actions{
  padding:10px 12px;border-radius:10px;background:#FFFDF6;border:1px solid #FFE7A7;
  justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;
}
.agg-toggle{
  display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;padding:7px 10px;border-radius:999px;
  background:#fff;border:1px solid #D7DEE8;font-size:12px;color:#455A64;
}
.agg-toggle input{margin:0;}
.agg-toolbar select{padding:6px 10px;border:1.5px solid #CFD8DC;border-radius:7px;
  font-size:13px;font-family:var(--font);}
.field-chip-row{display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin:10px 0 4px;}
.field-chip{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;background:#E8F0FE;color:var(--navy);border-radius:999px;padding:4px 10px;font-size:11px;font-weight:bold;}
.field-chip-empty{font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);margin:10px 0 4px;}
.field-chip-prefix{background:#FFF3E0;color:#BF6000;}
.agg-processing-cell{font-size:12px;line-height:1.6;white-space:pre-wrap;word-break:break-word;}
.agg-processing-cell.empty{color:var(--muted);}
.agg-processing-card-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:8px;margin-top:8px;}
.agg-period-cell{min-width:220px;max-width:260px;vertical-align:top;background:#FCFDFF;}
.agg-period-label{font-size:10px;font-weight:bold;color:#607D8B;margin-bottom:4px;}
.agg-assess-select,.agg-assess-memo{
  width:100%;border:1.5px solid #CFD8DC;border-radius:7px;font-size:12px;font-family:var(--font);
  padding:6px 8px;background:#fff;
}
.agg-assess-memo{min-height:64px;resize:vertical;}
.agg-assess-note{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);}
.grading-mode-note{font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);margin-left:auto;}
.grading-matrix-cell{min-width:140px;max-width:180px;vertical-align:top;background:#FCFDFF;}
.grading-matrix-evidence{
  margin-top:6px;font-size:11px;line-height:1.5;color:#455A64;
  white-space:pre-wrap;word-break:break-word;
}
.grading-matrix-empty{color:var(--muted);}
.grading-card-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:8px;margin-top:8px;}
.btn-ai{padding:8px 16px;border:none;border-radius:8px;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--purple),#AD1457);
  color:#fff;font-size:13px;font-weight:bold;cursor:pointer;font-family:var(--font);}
.btn-ai[disabled]{
  background:#fff;
  color:#90A4AE;
  border:1.5px solid #CFD8DC;
  cursor:not-allowed;
  box-shadow:none;
  opacity:1;
}
.btn-export{padding:8px 16px;border:none;border-radius:8px;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--orange),#FB8C00);
  color:#fff;font-size:13px;font-weight:bold;cursor:pointer;font-family:var(--font);}
.ai-report{white-space:pre-wrap;font-size:13px;line-height:1.8;
  background:#F3E5F5;border-radius:9px;padding:14px;
  border-left:4px solid var(--purple);margin-top:12px;display:none;}
.ai-report.ready{display:block;}
.debug-note{
  margin-top:8px;padding:10px 12px;border-radius:9px;
  background:#FFF8E1;border:1px solid #FFE082;
  font-size:12px;line-height:1.7;color:#6D4C41;
  white-space:pre-wrap;word-break:break-word;
}
.debug-note .debug-summary{font-weight:bold;line-height:1.6;}
.debug-note details{margin-top:6px;}
.debug-note summary{cursor:pointer;color:#8D6E63;font-weight:bold;}
.debug-note code{
  display:block;margin-top:6px;padding:8px 10px;border-radius:7px;
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.72);overflow-x:auto;white-space:pre-wrap;
  font-family:ui-monospace,SFMono-Regular,Consolas,monospace;
  font-size:11px;line-height:1.5;color:#5D4037;
}
.portfolio-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px;margin-top:10px;}
.portfolio-empty{
  text-align:center;padding:14px;color:#999;background:#fff;border-radius:9px;
  border:1px solid #ECEFF1;
}
.portfolio-table-wrap,.agg-table-wrap{overflow-x:auto;}
.portfolio-cards{display:none;flex-direction:column;gap:10px;}
.portfolio-card,.agg-card{
  border:1px solid #E3F2FD;border-radius:10px;background:#FAFCFF;padding:12px;
}
.portfolio-card-top,.agg-card-top{
  display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:space-between;gap:10px;margin-bottom:8px;
}
.portfolio-card-title,.agg-card-title{font-size:14px;font-weight:bold;color:var(--navy);line-height:1.5;}
.portfolio-card-meta,.agg-card-meta{font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.6;}
.portfolio-card-block,.agg-card-block{margin-top:8px;}
.portfolio-card-label,.agg-card-label,.status-field-label{margin-bottom:6px;}
.portfolio-card-text,.agg-card-text{
  font-size:13px;line-height:1.8;color:#263238;white-space:pre-wrap;word-break:break-word;
}
.agg-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px;margin-top:10px;}
.agg-cards{display:none;flex-direction:column;gap:10px;}
  @media(max-width:640px){
  .agg-table-wrap{display:none;}
  .agg-cards{display:flex;}
  .grading-mode-note{width:100%;margin-left:0;}
  .agg-toolbar-actions{justify-content:flex-start;}
}
@media(max-width:640px){
  .portfolio-table-wrap{display:none;}
  .portfolio-cards{display:flex;}
}

/* modal */
.modal-bg{display:none;position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,.4);
  z-index:500;align-items:center;justify-content:center;}
.modal-bg.show{display:flex;}
.modal{background:#fff;border-radius:14px;padding:22px;
  width:92%;max-width:500px;box-shadow:0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,.2);}
.modal h3{font-size:16px;font-weight:bold;margin-bottom:14px;color:var(--navy);}
.modal-btns{display:flex;gap:8px;margin-top:14px;justify-content:flex-end;}

.toast-stack{
  position:fixed;right:16px;bottom:16px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px;
  z-index:900;max-width:min(420px,calc(100vw - 24px));
}
.toast{
  border-radius:12px;padding:12px 14px;box-shadow:0 10px 28px rgba(0,0,0,.18);
  color:#fff;font-size:13px;line-height:1.6;white-space:pre-wrap;word-break:break-word;
  transform:translateY(10px);opacity:0;transition:transform .18s ease,opacity .18s ease;
}
.toast.show{transform:translateY(0);opacity:1;}
.toast.info{background:#37474F;}
.toast.success{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#2E7D32,#388E3C);}
.toast.error{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#B71C1C,#C62828);}
@media(max-width:640px){
  .toast-stack{left:12px;right:12px;bottom:12px;max-width:none;}
}

.spinner{display:inline-block;width:14px;height:14px;border:2px solid #CFD8DC;
  border-top-color:var(--sky);border-radius:50%;animation:spin .7s linear infinite;vertical-align:middle;}
@keyframes spin{to{transform:rotate(360deg);}}

/* prompt */
.prompt-box{margin-bottom:10px;}
.prompt-box .plbl{font-size:12px;font-weight:bold;color:var(--orange);margin-bottom:4px;display:block;}
.queue-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(120px,1fr));gap:8px;margin:10px 0 12px;}
.queue-box{background:#FAFCFF;border:1px solid #E3F2FD;border-radius:9px;padding:10px 12px;}
.queue-k{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:4px;}
.queue-v{font-size:20px;font-weight:bold;color:var(--navy);}
.queue-meta{font-size:12px;line-height:1.7;color:#455A64;background:#FAFAFA;border:1px solid #ECEFF1;border-radius:8px;padding:10px 12px;}
.queue-errors{margin-top:8px;font-size:12px;line-height:1.7;white-space:pre-wrap;word-break:break-word;color:#5D4037;}
.btn-queue{padding:8px 14px;border:none;border-radius:8px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--orange),#FB8C00);color:#fff;font-size:13px;font-weight:bold;cursor:pointer;font-family:var(--font);}
.log-toolbar{display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:center;margin-bottom:10px;}
.log-textarea{min-height:420px;font-family:ui-monospace,SFMono-Regular,Consolas,monospace;font-size:12px;line-height:1.6;white-space:pre;}
</style>

files.name: teacher_subsection_aggregate
files.source:
📚 単元記録を確認

AIには児童名を送らず出席番号だけを送信します。受信後の表示は名簿と照合して氏名に置き換えます。

A以上

要支援候補

files.name: teacher_subsection_grading
files.source:
📝 単元の評定をする

単元ごとの根拠を見ながら評定できます。
AIには児童名を送らず出席番号だけを送信します。反映時は出席番号で評定先を照合し、画面は氏名付きで表示します。
観点を選ぶと根拠に使う項目を表示します。
評定に使う記録の取得状況を表示します。
#なまえ評定

files.name: teacher_subsection_portfolio
files.source:
🧒 児童別ポートフォリオ・AI所見

AIには児童名を送らず出席番号だけを送信します。表示名は名簿とローカル照合して付けています。
児童を選ぶと取得件数を表示します。
教科単元時間日付ふりかえりランク
児童を選択してください
児童を選択してください

files.name: teacher_subsection_subject
files.source:
🏫 教科ごとのデフォルト項目

単元作成時にこの設定が引き継がれます。

教科を選択してください

➕ この教科のカスタム項目を追加

選択肢は 1 行に 1 つずつ入力できます。カンマ区切りでも読み取ります。

files.name: teacher_subsection_units
files.source:
📚 単元一覧

一覧から探しつつ、右のボタンで新規追加欄へすぐ移動できます。

➕ 新しい単元を追加

📋 この単元の記入項目

プリセットをワンクリックで追加、オン/オフや並び順も変更できます。

➕ カスタム項目を追加

選択肢は 1 行に 1 つずつ入力できます。カンマ区切りでも読み取ります。
既存項目を編集するときは、一覧の「編集」ボタンから読み込めます。項目キーは保持されるので、既存記録は消えません。

files.name: teacher
